name: Spicy Szechuan Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tablespoon Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the tofu. Drain again.
2. Cut into 1-inch square pieces.
3. Heat a wok over high flame and add oil.
4. When hot, add ginger, garlic, and 2 tablespoons of scallions. Cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add hot bean paste and tofu to the wok. Stir gently.
6. Add tamari, salt, sugar, and stock. Bring to a full boil.
7. Thicken with cornstarch.
8. Add sesame oil, chili oil, and peppercorn powder.
9. Sprinkle with remaining scallions and serve with brown rice.
